Thanks for contributing to combined-ai! Please fill out the sections below.
For substantial changes (new provider/strategy, API changes), please link an
issue where the approach was discussed first.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Use "Closes/Fixes #N" so the issue auto-closes on merge. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new provider / strategy / option)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal change (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] **Tests** added or updated to cover the change (mocked, network-free).
- [ ] `yarn lint`, `yarn typecheck`, `yarn test`, and `yarn build` all pass locally.
- [ ] **`CHANGELOG.md`** updated under `## [Unreleased]` (Added / Changed / Fixed) if behavior changed.
- [ ] **`README.md`** (and `src/index.ts` exports) updated if the public API changed.
- [ ] This PR is focused on one logical change.
- [ ] No secrets (API keys, tokens) are included in the diff or test fixtures.

## How to verify

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to confirm the change works. -->

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, open questions. -->
